description_for_human: Search, create, remix, and cook recipes on IngredientPals.
description_for_model: Plugin for searching, creating, remixing, and cooking recipes on IngredientPals. Creation and remixing produce a DRAFT that the agent iterates with the user via further prompts before publishing. Tools: search_recipes, get_recipe, create_recipe_draft (from prompt / image / URL / YouTube / base64), remix_recipe_draft, get_current_draft, discard_draft, publish_draft. For the full draft -> iterate -> publish loop and step-by-step cooking mode, follow skill.md.

auth.instructions: Obtain an API key from your IngredientPals account (POST /api/keys while logged in). Send it as: Authorization: Bearer ipk_...
